recipe.description:
Pulsed chickpeas, cilantro, and parsley together then added it to the latke mix (dough?) before frying. Latkafel
really good with applesauce, tahini, or that garlicy yoghurt sauce (Toum) they serve at middle eastern restaurants.

Mine is a Polish recipe. Floury potatoes grated on large and as much liquid squeezed out as I can. No powdered anything. Finely chopped onion and parsley, eggs, salt and pepper, a little flour and a couple of eggs. I have been known to add finely chopped chili pepper.

applesauce w/ cranberries is good with it
recipe.notes: Tags: Middle Eastern, Side, Normal, potatoes
recipe.title: Latkes
